string.text:
A sub-machine gun variant of the HK433. Like its parent rifle, the HK437 combines the features of the G36 and HK416 assault rifles, utilizing the short-stroke gas system from the G36 and the HK416-style lower receiver, as well as a quick-release barrel. The receiver consists of two parts - upper receiver and lower receiver. The barrel is locked by rotating the bolt.
 With its SMG size and being chambered in calibre .300 Blackout, it is inteded for medium-range tactical applications by special military and police forces requiring high power in a compact size. A number has been ordered for the German Army Special Forces and the Ukraine Main Directorate of Intelligence.
 This model seems to have an integrated suppressor.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[d_green] Sights: %c[0,250,250,0]some sights for the %c[d_cyan]"Picatinny rail"
 %c[d_purple] • %c[d_green] Integrated silencer
